W7S Demo TS Static

Static frontend, interpreter backend, isolate edge.

STATIC FRONTEND MARKER. This page should be served by W7S static hosting after isolate returns a miss for frontend paths.

Frontend

Served by `frontend/dist`

If you can read STATIC FRONTEND MARKER, static hosting handled `/`.
